englishDefinitions: An informal expression describing someone who runs excessively, compulsively, or with great enthusiasm and speed.
Someone who is considered crazy for how much or how fast they run.
examples: She's a real running fool — she jogs ten miles every single morning before breakfast.
The coach called him a running fool because he never seemed to get tired on the field.
He became known as the running fool of the neighborhood for his daily marathons.
